entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,942Chapters: 3/16Kudos: 9

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: Nothing Else Matters
entry.summary:
Author: stereksterek

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,285Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Stiles chuckled and hummed to himself as he looked around at all the trees, ultimately wondering whether he should start traveling in a different direction other than just straight ahead. “My broodar is telling me I should head in this direction.” Derek squinted in confusion on the other end of the phone, “Broodar?” “Yeah. It’s like a gaydar, but for detecting brooding.” ... Or, the one where Stiles invents a new type of navigation, and Derek regrets asking for clarification.

entry.title: It was the Year
entry.summary:
Author: BytheBry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,753Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Stiles Stilinski and Derek Hale were born on the same day.Somewhere along the way, that turned into shared birthdays, shared beds, shared dreams, shared lives.A story told in years about growing up together, falling in love, and choosing each other over and over again.

entry.title: Iris (I Just Want You To Know Who I Am)
entry.summary:
Author: PlutoandMars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,124Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 136

Summary: Stiles had made many decisions in his life. Good and bad and horrendously bad. Mexico had been bad. He had made the wrong choice, had had to live with the consequences until he graduated, until he could run from Beacon Hills and not look back.He had known at some point that the call would come, he knew at some point he would return, thrust into another life or death situation with odds stacked against them, confronted by his past and the one person he had desperately tried to forget.Derek had left Beacon Hills on a revenge mission, so sure he wouldn’t return until he had killed Kate. He had thought he was invincible, that finally, he could lure her away from Scott, from his pack, from Stiles. He had thought he could protect him. Six years have gone by and Derek is back in Beacon Hills. The circumstances have changed.Things become dire, Stiles comes back and Derek hasn’t seen Stiles in years. They haven’t spoken about all the unspoken things they definitely should've spoken about. Time has passed, made a delicate distance between them that feels like, with one wrong move, it could rip everything apart.

entry.title: The Secret
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_A

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,389Chapters: 1/8Kudos: 6

Summary: Seems like everyone BUT Stiles is in on a secret involving Stiles and Derek yet no one is willing to help the poor human and let him know. Meanwhile Derek is trying desperately to not show any emotions that might hint at the truth. All of this is going on when the pack is under attack by a strange wolf pack threatening to take over the Hale land.

entry.title: Emergency Desires
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,161Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: Derek Hale’s world collapses when his husband of ten years, Jackson, is hospitalized after a stroke. Alone in the ICU, he’s comforted by the tall, muscular Dr. Stiles Stilinski. One charged look leads to another, and soon Derek is getting fucked raw over Jackson’s hospital bed, moaning louder than the heart monitor while his husband lies right beside them. Or the one where a married Derek cheats on his husband with his hot doctor while Jackson lies unconscious in the same room, and he can't bring himself to stop.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,243Chapters: 16/40Kudos: 41

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: Dying In Love
entry.summary:
Author: amatorial

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,067Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 95

Summary: After dropping out of his FBI internship, Stiles returned to Beacon Hills, struggling to outgrow the version of himself high school forced him to become. He wasn't sure what he was doing with his life, but he kept busy among the shelves at The Reading Nook, letting the quiet and routine distract him from the memories. And then Derek Hale walked in. Derek being in his life again stirred a hunger inside Stiles, a wanting that consumed him whole. It left him breathless, filled with a love so fierce it clawed at his chest and threatened to tear him apart inside.

entry.title: Your Frequency
entry.summary:
Author: PromptedScribe

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,825Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 40

Summary: Derek Hale is a Class Five Sentinel — one of the most powerful in federal service — and he's falling apart. Four years after his former Guide used their bond to crawl inside his head and sell state secrets through his senses, he's sworn off Guides entirely. But the longer he goes without one, the more his senses fragment: zone-outs, feral episodes, walls through which he puts various colleagues. The Bureau of Sentinel-Guide Affairs gives him an ultimatum — accept a new Guide or be locked in a containment facility for everyone's safety. Enter Stiles Stilinski: newly manifested, top of his class, already fired from two field placements for being smarter than his supervisors and incapable of keeping that information to himself. Their compatibility index is ninety-fourth percentile. Their first meeting goes about as well as you'd expect. This is a story about the difference between bonds that are taken and bonds that are chosen. About a man who learned that trust is a weapon, and the loudmouthed, gummy-bear-eating disaster of a Guide who teaches him it can also be a door.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Someone Else's Tupperware
entry.summary:
Author: ModeratelyScathed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,512Chapters: 4/7Kudos: 91

Summary: The funny thing is, Stiles actually has no idea who just climbed through his window. Doesn't really care, either. All he wants to do is catch a few hours of uninterrupted sleep before the nightmares drag him back to consciousness.Again.Still, he expects some sort of snarky response if it's Derek or Peter. Or maybe the vocal embodiment of Scott's puppy dog eyes if it's his best friend.He doesn't expect several seconds of silence.And he definitely doesn't expect the sudden and unmistakable thump of a body hitting the ground.

entry.title: Face To Face?
entry.summary:
Author: IgotStile_5

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,734Chapters: 4/15Kudos: 47

Summary: Derek moves back home after 4 years to finish his last years of college at beacon university. He misses his uncle Peter, ant Melissa, and of course, his little brother Scott. He wants to move home and rebuild the hale house. So he moves back to become hills, and on his first day back he ends up face to face with the hottest guys he has ever seen. But not only is he face to face with the hottest guys he has ever seen, to top it all off he is butt naked…..interesting. (Derek is going to collage to be an architect, stiles is going to be a criminologist, Scott is going to be a veterinarian……. Derek is 4 years older then them)

entry.title: Inhibitions, or lack of
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,918Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 28

Summary: I was having a normal morning. Eating questionable rice. Wearing my "I’m the hot girl that every guy wants " hoodie. The usual domestic bliss. I opened the door. And there was Derek. Derek Hale. Derek Hale From Beacon Hills. Holding the hand of a young boy who looked approximately ten years old. With luggage. Multiple duffle bags. And those rolling suitcases. The kind you take when you're not coming back anytime soon. Why is Derek Hale from Beacon Hills, standing on my doorstep? How does he even know where I live. "Derek," I said, because my brain needed a second to process. "What's—" "I'm staying here from now on," he said, barging past me before I could form a coherent objection. "And I prefer a fall wedding. Color scheme, blue and gold." I blinked. I blinked again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale
  • Stiles Stilinski
  • Eli Hale (Teen Wolf)
  • Alan Deaton
  • stiles is hilarious
  • derek and stiles are secretly in love with each other
  • spells
  • Curses
  • Older Stiles

entry.title: Two Minutes
entry.summary:
Author: SashaDoeDeer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,687Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 84

Summary: “This is Sheriff Noah John Stilinski of the Beacon Hills Sheriff’s Office. The date is February twenty second, twenty fourteen. The hour is six thirty-two AM. This is the questioning of Derek Hale, age twenty-six, regarding the events of Mieczyslaw “Stiles” Stilinski’s kidnapping. Under California Penal Code section two-zero-nine, this case qualifies for both asportation and aggravated kidnapping." Derek listens to every word. He's been in trouble with the law before- hell, he's even been falsely accused before, so that's not new either- yet this is new territory. He can't get locked up because then Stiles won't have someone to scent him, or clean his wounds, or protect him against the psychotic doctors from the institute who are certainly looking for them. Christ, Stiles must be so defenseless right now. Derek has to clear this up now and with a quickness; it doesn't matter how much he’ll have to apologize to Stiles for saying every vulnerable, dehumanizing little thing they went through together in that small concrete cage.
